channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-07-08 to 2026-07-14
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 4 INTERESTING, 3 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Wed 2026-07-08: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.3 ft @ 5.7 sec, wind 5 kt N, water 70°F. Low tide: 07:37, 20:45. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.3 ft); period too short (5.7 sec); wind direction off (N). Thu 2026-07-09: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.1 ft @ 7.0 sec, wind 6 kt SSW, water 71°F. Low tide: 08:40, 21:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Fri 2026-07-10: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.4 sec, wind 4 kt SW, water 71°F. Low tide: 09:43, 22:54. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sat 2026-07-11: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.9 ft @ 6.7 sec, wind 5 kt NW, water 72°F. Low tide: 10:45, 23:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sun 2026-07-12: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.9 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 8 kt ENE, water 73°F. Low tide: 11:45. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (ENE). Mon 2026-07-13: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.4 ft @ 7.1 sec, wind 5 kt ENE, water 73°F. Low tide: 00:49, 12:44. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (ENE). Tue 2026-07-14: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 08:00, 1.7 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 7 kt WSW, water 73°F. Low tide: 01:44, 13:42. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 4 INTERESTING, 3 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Wed 2026-07-08: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.3 ft @ 5.7 sec, wind 5 kt N, water 70°F. Low tide: 07:37, 20:45. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.3 ft); period too short (5.7 sec); wind direction off (N).
  • Thu 2026-07-09: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.1 ft @ 7.0 sec, wind 6 kt SSW, water 71°F. Low tide: 08:40, 21:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Fri 2026-07-10: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.4 sec, wind 4 kt SW, water 71°F. Low tide: 09:43, 22:54. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sat 2026-07-11: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.9 ft @ 6.7 sec, wind 5 kt NW, water 72°F. Low tide: 10:45, 23:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sun 2026-07-12: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.9 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 8 kt ENE, water 73°F. Low tide: 11:45. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (ENE).
  • Mon 2026-07-13: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.4 ft @ 7.1 sec, wind 5 kt ENE, water 73°F. Low tide: 00:49, 12:44. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (ENE).
  • Tue 2026-07-14: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 08:00, 1.7 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 7 kt WSW, water 73°F. Low tide: 01:44, 13:42. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
